title: Junkyard Utils
description: Adds miscellaneous items that fit into Create and Create: Aeronautics
body:
**Junkyard Utils adds numerous items that assist with making effective machinery and vehicles!**
- **Jerrycan**: Similar to a bucket, but can transfer fluid to any container (such as directly to engine blocks) and with higher precision.
- **Redstone Dial**: A compact dial, designed for use with Drive By Wire, that displays analog redstone level similarly to Nixie Tubes
- **Fluid Meter**: A side-mounted, compact, and fluid-focused comparator that reads fluid levels of containers
- **Headlight**: Slim, vehicle-oriented light source with configurable positioning designed for cosmetics
- **Roller Wheel**: Standalone wheel block with low friction. Raises friction when powered by redstone, allowing for compact landing gear with brakes. (Requires Sable)
- **Large Propeller Blade**: Compact blade that behaves like a windmill sail with configurable position, designed for less chunky propellers. (Requires Sable)

Contact us and report bugs at our **[Discord Server!](https://discord.gg/dA3RTMM5Ae)**

**Details:**

- The Jerrycan fills itself with a normal right-click. It will empty into the targeted block by shift-right-clicking. It will also display its fill level and fluid above the hotbar when wearing goggles.
- Block positions can be adjusted by wrenching them.
- The propeller blade **does not automatically glue itself** like windmill sails.

This mod is fully compatible with Sable and VS2.

Mod by Xodus4

Feel free to use in any modpack!

Made with hybrid MCreator
